description: A versatile Unity Editor framework designed to engineer complex projectile mechanics. It features modular components for 2D and 3D physics, accompanied by real-time trajectory prediction and visualization systems.
name: Projectile System
highlights: Created a modular SDK/toolkit allowing designers to configure complex physics-based projectile paths without code.
Derived trajectory calculations handling multi-bounce paths integrated with Unity's physics engine variables.
Programmed a custom Unity Editor GUI and Editor Window for real-time visualization and parameter adjustments.
